evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR revenue totaled $51.4 million in December 2023, $0.7 or 1.4% higher than the forecast.
LIRR revenue totaled $568.8 million through December 2023, $3.3 million or 0.6% higher than the forecast.
Commutation revenue of $189.7 million was $6.5 million or 3.5% higher than the forecast.
Non-commutation revenue of $379.1 million was $(3.2) million or (0.8)% lower than the forecast.

tool_args.label: Total Labor Expenses Non-Reimbursable Preliminary Actual 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: Commutation revenue of $14.6 million was $0.4 million or 2.6% higher than the forecast.
Non-commutation revenue of $36.8 million was $0.3 million or 0.9% higher than the forecast.
Maintenance of Equipment Overtime of $73.4M is 43% of 2023 YTD Actuals.
MOW of $36.2M is 21% of 2023 YTD Actuals.
Transportation Overtime of $52.2M is 30% of 2023 YTD Actuals.
Stations Overtime of $6.7M is 4% of 2023 YTD Actuals.

payload.gap_text: This report presents preliminary 2023 results that are compared to the November Forecast and are subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review.
payload.description: Results are flagged as preliminary and may be revised after final accounting adjustments and audit review.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This report presents preliminary 2023 results that are compared to the November Forecast and are subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review.

tool_args.label: Results Based on Preliminary Close of General Ledger

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.
payload.description: Financial results throughout the report are based on preliminary close of the general ledger, not final audited figures.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.
